summary: Live PR inventory shard repaired after deterministic validation identified all five hydrated PR targets as security-sensitive. Each exact PR ref is routed to central OpenClaw security handling with non-mutating route_security actions. No cluster-scoped security routing, close, merge, label, comment, or fix PR path is emitted.
